sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 54:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 54:1
items.html: This can be likened to the thickness of the wall of a vessel that is made of four layers one around the other, so the abundance in the vessel touches only its internality, meaning the innermost layer in the vessel. (Inner Observation, Chapter One, Item 5)
